title: 1x Silver 29cm Metal Splatter Screen - Mesh Kitchen Cooking Frying Pan Oil Fat Splash Guard Lid Cover - By Ashley
features: This screen is manufactured from a fine mesh that will allow steam to escape while protecting stove tops & kitchen worktops from cooking splatters.
It also comes with a long handle to help keep hands at a safe distance from the heat, plus a grooved outer lip that helps securely cover your pan.
It is dishwasher safe for easy cleaning.
2 Year Warranty - With a dedicated Customer Service Team committed to providing peace of mind from our door to yours.
description: This screen is manufactured from a fine mesh that will allow steam to escape while protecting stove tops & kitchen worktops from cooking splatters. It also comes with a long handle to help keep hands at a safe distance from the heat, plus a grooved outer lip that helps securely cover your pan. It is dishwasher safe for easy cleaning. It will fit most frying pans that are 29cm/11” or smaller.
